Contact.title: Contact
Contact.subtitle: CONTACT DETAILS
Contact.seo_description: Have a project you'd like to talk about? Or want to hire me? Get in touch with me via email, LinkedIn, or Discord.
Contact.intro: Have a project you'd like to discuss or just want to ask something? Feel free to reach out via the form or my social media channels.
Contact.form_disclaimer: Let me know via email and I'll get back to you as soon as possible.
